approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and continue safe sprint slices across the intelligence pipe.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub source-proof readback for proposed-card approval rows without creating backlog cards or authorizing builds.
constraints: Do not create backlog cards, approval records, Scoper records, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, route records, destination records, Harlan messages, model calls, extraction runs, connector probes, browser sessions, or external writes.
Do not auto-promote Director, Scoper, Portfolio, or proposed-card recommendations into backlog, sprint, route action, Harlan, or build execution.
Every source-proof row must derive from Build Portfolio, Morning Proposed Cards, and Proposed Card Approval Preflight readbacks only.
Fail proof if raw atom/hit trace or source lineage disappears.
Fail proof if any row claims it created a card, wrote backlog/Scoper/Portfolio/approval records, opened Current Sprint, externally sent, or authorized a build.
